# EditorExportPlatformLinuxBSD

**Inherits:** [EditorExportPlatformPC](class_editorexportplatformpc.md#class-editorexportplatformpc) **<** [EditorExportPlatform](class_editorexportplatform.md#class-editorexportplatform) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-binary-format-architecture"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **binary_format/architecture** [🔗](#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-binary-format-architecture)

Application executable architecture.

Supported architectures: `x86_32`, `x86_64`, `arm64`, `arm32`, `rv64`, `ppc64`, and `loongarch64`.

Official export templates include `x86_32`, `x86_64`, `arm32`, and `arm64` binaries only.

---

<a id="class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-binary-format-embed-pck"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **binary_format/embed_pck** [🔗](#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-binary-format-embed-pck)

If `true`, project resources are embedded into the executable.

---

<a id="class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-custom-template-debug"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **custom_template/debug** [🔗](#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-custom-template-debug)

Path to the custom export template. If left empty, default template is used.

---

<a id="class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-custom-template-release"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **custom_template/release** [🔗](#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-custom-template-release)

Path to the custom export template. If left empty, default template is used.

---

<a id="class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-debug-export-console-wrapper"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **debug/export_console_wrapper** [🔗](#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-debug-export-console-wrapper)

If `true`, a console wrapper is exported alongside the main executable, which allows running the project with enabled console output.

---

<a id="class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-shader-baker-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **shader_baker/enabled** [🔗](#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-shader-baker-enabled)

If `true`, shaders will be compiled and embedded in the application. This option is only supported when using the Forward+ or Mobile renderers.

**Note:** When exporting as a dedicated server, the shader baker is always disabled since no rendering is performed.

---

<a id="class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-ssh-remote-deploy-cleanup-script"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **ssh_remote_deploy/cleanup_script** [🔗](#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-ssh-remote-deploy-cleanup-script)

Script code to execute on the remote host when app is finished.

The following variables can be used in the script:

- `{temp_dir}` - Path of temporary folder on the remote, used to upload app and scripts to.
- `{archive_name}` - Name of the ZIP containing uploaded application.
- `{exe_name}` - Name of application executable.
- `{cmd_args}` - Array of the command line argument for the application.

---

<a id="class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-ssh-remote-deploy-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **ssh_remote_deploy/enabled** [🔗](#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-ssh-remote-deploy-enabled)

Enables remote deploy using SSH/SCP.

---

<a id="class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-ssh-remote-deploy-extra-args-scp"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **ssh_remote_deploy/extra_args_scp** [🔗](#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-ssh-remote-deploy-extra-args-scp)

Array of the additional command line arguments passed to the SCP.

---

<a id="class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-ssh-remote-deploy-extra-args-ssh"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **ssh_remote_deploy/extra_args_ssh** [🔗](#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-ssh-remote-deploy-extra-args-ssh)

Array of the additional command line arguments passed to the SSH.

---

<a id="class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-ssh-remote-deploy-host"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **ssh_remote_deploy/host** [🔗](#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-ssh-remote-deploy-host)

Remote host SSH user name and address, in `user@address` format.

---

<a id="class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-ssh-remote-deploy-port"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **ssh_remote_deploy/port** [🔗](#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-ssh-remote-deploy-port)

Remote host SSH port number.

---

<a id="class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-ssh-remote-deploy-run-script"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **ssh_remote_deploy/run_script** [🔗](#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-ssh-remote-deploy-run-script)

Script code to execute on the remote host when running the app.

The following variables can be used in the script:

- `{temp_dir}` - Path of temporary folder on the remote, used to upload app and scripts to.
- `{archive_name}` - Name of the ZIP containing uploaded application.
- `{exe_name}` - Name of application executable.
- `{cmd_args}` - Array of the command line argument for the application.

---

<a id="class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-texture-format-etc2-astc"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **texture_format/etc2_astc** [🔗](#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-texture-format-etc2-astc)

If `true`, project textures are exported in the ETC2/ASTC format.

---

<a id="class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-texture-format-s3tc-bptc"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **texture_format/s3tc_bptc** [🔗](#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd-property-texture-format-s3tc-bptc)

If `true`, project textures are exported in the S3TC/BPTC format.
